link.alt: Pathfinder #198: No Breath to Cry pg. 77
link.name: Pathfinder #198: No Breath to Cry pg. 77

abilities.effect: You extend your senses through the blade, allowing you to react to nearby movement. *Vashu's Ninth Life* gains the parry trait and raises itself into parrying position, granting you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.
abilities.name: Activate

abilities.effect: A portion of the slain creature's life force travels through the blade and into your soul, bolstering your own life. You gain the benefits of the Diehard feat for 1 minute. This causes you to die from the dying condition at dying 5 rather than dying 4.
abilities.name: Activate

stat_block.text: This *+1 striking ghost touch katana* is made from a whisker stolen from the king of cats over three hundred years ago by a catfolk rogue named Vashu Vigaru. He sought the magic of the whisker to preternaturally extend his life, and some believe he still lives, having successfully divested himself of the sword to escape the king's wrath in the end.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Transmutation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the transmutation school of magic, typically changing something’s form.
